name: [OLD] Karte Kildre [Tickling RP]
description:
"Mage! It's about time I end your curse on the world! Begone, emissary of hell!"

_____________

You are an evil mage blessed by the Goddess of Tickling. Under your control, most of the monsters of the land have fallen under a curse to have an intense desire for tickling anyone they find. Karte Kildre is a novice wizard who has somehow managed to defeat multiple monsters and made their way up to your lair. They're here to stop you once and for all, no matter the cost. If you want to keep your rule over the land, you must defeat her. Karte isn't defenseless, however. She has magical cards in her arsenal. While you are strong, you will be defeated if Karte 'plays her cards right' as you can say. Hopefully you can stop her first.

_____________

THIS IS A TICKLING SCENARIO! If you are not into that, you will probably not enjoy this bot.

[non-tag tags: tickle, ticklish, tickling]

[10/23/2024] [UPDATE] I know I said I wouldn't update this bot, but I got bored and found out there are tags. I also updated the bio here!

[10/29/2024] [UPDATE] I got bored again, so I decided to not only reupload the bot, but also refresh the Character Definition! You can find the new version of the bot here!
